title: 退学博士要打十个 | 原文
content: The article portrays a former PhD student, Gung (耿同学), turning into a whistleblower after discovering data problems in a paper by a prominent university professor (王平). Gung recalls past controversies involving the professor’s colleague and uncovers suspicious claims in a Nature sub‑journal article. He confronts the issue publicly, reflecting how academic integrity can be compromised even by respected scholars. The piece frames this revelation within a broader narrative of betrayal familiar to the author’s literary influences.

normalizedTitle: 退学博士要打十个 原文

title: 微软的“全天候零碳承诺”为何对减排至关重要
content: Microsoft’s continuous “24/7 Carbon‑Free” pledge is vital because it shifts the company’s data‑center operations to zero‑emission power around the clock. By aligning with renewable energy contracts and reducing reliance on fossil fuels, Microsoft aims to cut its carbon footprint significantly. This sustained commitment supports broader climate goals, encouraging other tech firms to adopt similar practices and accelerating progress toward global emissions reductions.

title: 今年戛纳，台上大骂“Fuck AI” | 原文
content: At the 2024 Cannes Film Festival, director Guillermo del Toro shocked the audience by yanking onto the microphone during a pre‑premiere event, loudly declaring “Fuck AI.” The remark was delivered immediately after a 4K restoration screening and was met with stunned silence followed by laughter and applause. Cannes’ artistic director responded by amplifying the statement into an official stance against certain uses of artificial intelligence. The incident highlighted growing controversy over AI’s role in filmmaking.
eventKey: 今年戛纳-台上大骂“fuck-ai”
normalizedTitle: 今年戛纳 台上大骂“fuck ai” 原文

content: Bloomberg reports that Samsung faces a potential labor dispute that could lead to a strike. The situation highlights the implications for supply chains and the broader semiconductor market.

title: 20 年原生 iOS 开发者的反思：为什么复杂文本处理最终还是要靠 Electron？
content: A veteran Swift developer tried building a Markdown‑enabled chat app purely with native macOS technologies, but encountered performance, rendering, and UI limitations. TextKit, SwiftUI, and AppKit approaches failed to provide smooth, scrollable, richly formatted text. Switching to WebKit, and ultimately an Electron project, solved the problems instantly, delivering reliable Markdown rendering, smooth scrolling, and built‑in text controls. The experience shows that for complex, long‑form text the native SDKs are inadequate, while Web technologies provide immediate, high‑performance solutions.

normalizedTitle: 20 年原生 ios 开发者的反思 为什么复杂文本处理最终还是要靠 electron

title: The Plan to Make American Crime Obsolete
content: David Ulevitch interviews Col. Jeffrey Glover and Rahul Sidhu on how AI, drones, and sensor networks are transforming public safety. The discussion highlights drone‑first responder programs, body‑camera analytics for burnout detection, brain‑scan wellness checks, and layered sensor systems that convert reactive policing into data‑driven, proactive response. They examine the challenges of deploying technology at scale, the importance of on‑the‑beat experience, and how policing skills will evolve over the next decade.

title: AI 爆发的时代如何跟上节奏
content:
rt 感觉现在刚跟上新的产品和 coding 就有更新的玩法出现了，发展速度太快了，一直在学习。

是选择一直更新手头的工具。
 还是开摆，只做一些了解，不上手。
 或者阶段性更新？

各位 V 友怎么看

title: 热搜第一，苹果华为小米手机集体“打骨折”：最高降3000元，现在该出手吗？
content: Apple, Huawei and Xiaomi announced large price cuts before the 618 sale, with the iPhone 17 Pro dropping over ¥1,000 and the iPhone 17 falling to ¥4,499 after subsidies. Xiaomi’s 15 Ultra and Huawei’s Mate X7/Mate X6 also saw steep reductions (up to ¥3,000). Analysts say Apple’s move reshapes the ¥6,000‑segment, leveraging supply‑chain control to gain market share, while Huawei and Xiaomi respond defensively to maintain their high‑end footholds.

title: 2026 05 18 HackerNews
content: Mozilla argues that year‑age checks on VPNs do not protect minors and would harm privacy, calling for platform responsibility and better digital literacy instead. A researcher exposed a BitLocker “backdoor” called YellowKey, prompting caution about relying on Microsoft’s encryption. A new Rust‑based minimal coding proxy, Zerostack, offers low‑memory, multi‑model support. Other items cover AI subscription cost risks, Malta’s free ChatGPT Plus rollout, Apple’s AI integration debate, and a comparison of Apple Silicon and cloud inference costs.
eventKey: 2026-hackernews
normalizedTitle: 2026 05 18 hackernews

title: 阿斯麦与塔塔电子达成合作，推进印度芯片计划
content: ASML and Tata Electronics have signed an agreement to boost India’s semiconductor production. ASML’s technology will help Tata build a 300‑mm wafer fab in Gujarat, a US$11 billion investment aimed at making chips for automotive, mobile devices and AI. The partnership aligns with India’s goal of expanding local chip manufacturing and will also collaborate on talent development, supply chain expansion and R&D infrastructure. The MoU was signed during PM Modi’s visit to the Netherlands.
eventKey: 阿斯麦与塔塔电子达成合作-推进印度芯片计划
normalizedTitle: 阿斯麦与塔塔电子达成合作 推进印度芯片计划

title: AI超级应用正在重塑中国的互联网
content: AI “super‑apps” are reshaping China’s internet landscape by integrating multiple services—such as e‑commerce, social media, payments, and logistics—into single platforms. These comprehensive apps increase user engagement, streamline commerce, and bolster data collection, thereby accelerating digital transformation and tightening platform control across the country.
eventKey: ai超级应用正在重塑中国的互联网
normalizedTitle: ai超级应用正在重塑中国的互联网

title: 谷歌前 CEO 施密特毕业演讲被嘘：AI 焦虑触动学子神经
content: At Arizona State University, former Google CEO Eric Schmidt criticized AI at a graduation speech, provoking student boos. He noted widespread fear of AI, urged graduates to engage in shaping its future, and discussed industry layoffs and American anxiety over AI adoption. Some students also heckled him over last year’s sexual‑assault allegations, which his lawyer disputed as false. The event highlighted students’ mistrust of AI and the broader debate on its societal impact.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 和讯网
